channel.title: Projects on Cherry Web Design
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Cherry Web Design

item.title: CameoCraft - Talent Agency
item.description: 01 - Brand Concept & Positioning Cameocraft needed a brand identity that balances professional credibility with the bold energy of comic and pop culture conventions - positioning them clearly in the celebrity management space. 02 - Logo & Visual Identity Developed a logo and visual system built for versatility - strong across digital platforms, event materials, and promotional assets - while staying true to the fandom aesthetic the audience expects.

item.title: Dusk trade - Crypto trade platform
item.description: Disclaimer The platform is currently not publicly available. To request access to the interactive prototype or receive additional project details, please contact me directly. 01 - Product Vision & Strategy Designed a blockchain trading platform UI that translates complex financial and regulatory mechanisms into a clear, credible user experience - balancing innovation with institutional trust. 02 - UX & Interface Architecture Structured dashboards, trading views, and account flows around hierarchy and data density - critical in financial contexts where readability directly affects user decisions.

item.title: Walltips - Travel experience web-app
item.description: 01 - Product Vision & Strategy Walltips started as a frictionless mini app connecting hotel guests with local activities - no onboarding, no complexity. It evolved into a standalone platform aggregating experiences across the Italian territory, independent from individual hosts. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Led UX research defining personas across traveler types - leisure guests, experience-driven explorers, short-stay visitors. Journey mapping surfaced three recurring friction points: fragmented communication, lack of trust in third-party services, and information overload - directly shaping the core user flows and feature priorities.

item.title: Mindtooth - Brain reader
item.description: 01 - Project Vision & Strategy Designed a tablet interface to make complex EEG and brainwave data accessible to medical professionals - balancing scientific precision with usability for analysis and monitoring workflows. 02 - UX & Data Visualization Focused on information hierarchy and cognitive load reduction, enabling users to quickly interpret signals, charts, and session data without friction. Structured navigation across recordings and analytical views was central to the experience.

item.title: Wall of Fame - Memorabilia
item.description: 01 - Brand Concept & Inspiration The identity draws directly from American cinema culture - the "Wall of Fame" lettering echoes the Hollywood sign aesthetic to evoke instant associations with celebrity mythology, prestige, and collectability. 02 - Typography & Symbolism The logo contrasts two deliberate typographic voices: "Wall of Fame" - bold cinematic lettering referencing Hollywood, reinforcing the entertainment industry connection "Memorabilia" - handwritten script evoking autographs and personal signatures Together they represent the brand's core concept: iconic celebrities and their authenticated signed objects.

item.title: Furio DiVino - Sommellier
item.description: 01 - Brand Concept & Meaning The identity elevates wine to something almost sacred - the logo transforms a stylized red wine glass into a symbolic icon through three layered elements: A minimal red wine glass as the central symbol A golden-yellow circle forming the rim, evoking a halo Two stylized wings extending from the stem 02 - Typography & Wordplay The handwritten lettering "furio diVino" reflects personality and authenticity - essential for a sommelier's personal brand.

item.title: Econeth - Gaming crowfunding web-app
item.description: 01 - Product Vision & Strategy Econeth is a gamified crowdfunding platform for the gaming community - the design challenge was making contribution and campaign management flows intuitive while delivering a visually immersive, game-inspired experience across mobile and desktop. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Mapped user journeys around multi-step crowdfunding creation and gamification mechanics - ensuring reward systems felt motivating without adding friction to core actions like contributing, commenting, and campaign management.

item.title: FUIX - E-commerce
item.description: 01 - Project Vision & Strategy FUIX is a high-end e-commerce platform for luxury brands - the design goal was pairing visual elegance with frictionless shopping flows, from product discovery through to checkout. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Defined wireframes for all key flows - browsing, product discovery, and checkout - establishing clear hierarchies and navigation paths before moving into high-fidelity mockups. 03 - Design Process & Prototyping Built a full interactive prototype in InVision covering every purchase stage, validated for consistency with the luxury brand identity and responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

item.title: Adalot - Web agency
item.description: 01 - Project Vision Adalot Networks needed a corporate website that communicates their services clearly while delivering an engaging experience across all devices. Present services and expertise in a clear, structured way Balance visual appeal with usability Full responsiveness from mobile to XL desktop 02 - Design & Development I handled the project end-to-end, from mockups and brand graphics to a fully responsive, mobile-first frontend with jQuery animations and a custom horizontal scrolling effect.

item.title: Libes - Social Network Platform
item.description: 01 - Product Vision & Strategy Libes is a travel social platform built around user-generated content and community discovery - enabling ambassadors to create POI pages, explore destinations on an interactive global map, and share authentic travel insights. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Wireframed user flows for content creation, map interaction, and social engagement - focusing on what motivates travelers to share, and how to balance open contribution with quality control.

item.title: Yummo - Food Delivery
item.description: 01 - Product Vision & Strategy Yummo reimagines food delivery as a discovery experience - combining personalized recommendations, location-based suggestions, and delivery options to guide users toward restaurants and dishes that match their tastes. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Defined core flows through early-stage wireframing - search, recommendations, and notifications - grounded in research on how users decide where and what to eat, and how location-aware prompts can support that decision.

item.title: Mio Assicuratore - Insurance broker
item.description: Overview Mio Assicuratore simplifies insurance management for both clients and agents - covering policy management, onboarding, and customer interactions across an agent intranet and a client-facing web app. 01 - Project Vision & Strategy The platform serves two distinct users - agents managing clients and policies, and customers purchasing and monitoring coverage - requiring separate but visually consistent experiences for each. 02 - UX Research & Concept Development Collaborated with the development team to define user flows and wireframes for both products - focusing on simplifying complex insurance information and reducing friction across onboarding, policy management, and purchases.

item.title: da Lele - B&B
item.description: 01 - Brand Concept & Visual Direction The logo captures the essence of a cozy Roman stay through three layered elements: Handwritten-style lettering "da Lele" as the main brand element A coffee cup resting on a pillow - symbolising warmth and rest in a single image The tagline "bed & breakfast" to anchor the hospitality positioning 02 - Design Process Explored typographic balances and compositions to achieve a mark that feels welcoming and informal while remaining versatile across signage, print, and digital applications.

item.title: Defenx - Cybersecurity
item.description: 01 - Project Vision & Strategy Designed and built a corporate website to strengthen DEFENX's positioning in the cybersecurity sector - communicating technical authority while keeping complex solutions accessible to both enterprise clients and end users. 02 - UX & Information Architecture Defined the information architecture and user flows to simplify technical messaging without losing credibility - structuring products and solutions around clear categorization and conversion-oriented layouts. 03 - Design & Development Designed the full UI and implemented it in WordPress: structured layouts, strong typography, and a clean visual language reflecting the brand's cybersecurity expertise - responsive across all devices.

item.title: Voverc - Cloud Telephone
item.description: 01 - Project Vision & Strategy Designed Voverc's digital ecosystem - a corporate website and a cloud PBX admin panel - translating complex telephony functionality into a clear, accessible experience consistent across marketing and product. 02 - UX & Interface Design Defined information architecture and UI components for both products - with particular focus on simplifying technical configuration flows (call routing, user management, system settings) into structured, usable dashboards.

item.title: HelloLen* Cosplay
item.description: 01 - Project Vision & Strategy Designed and built a visual-first portfolio for a cosplay and modeling artist - balancing immersive imagery with clean navigation across mobile, tablet, and desktop. 02 - Design & UX Approach Worked without wireframes, following an instinctive, visually driven process. Layout decisions focused on: Image-centered compositions that maximize visual storytelling Minimal UI elements to keep focus on the artwork Consistent aesthetic rooted in anime, manga, and cosplay culture 03 - Frontend Development & Interaction Manually coded in HTML and SCSS with jQuery for interactions, including:
